goal: Fighing game based on Mortal Combat, with super high resolution, very well annimated fighers, for punch, kick, fireball, jump, duck, block. Fighers always face each other. 1 player vs computer.  Also graphically annimate the players when they get hit and when they get hit by fireball. Focus on great high resulution animated sequences for players fighting actions.
